beIN SPORTS 3.original_title: Rayo Vallecano vs Real Sociedad - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 32

beIN SPORTS 3.desc: Rayo Vallecano are unbeaten in their last five LaLiga matches against Real Sociedad  since a 2-1 defeat in April 2023; this is their longest unbeaten run against the Basque side in their top-flight history. Real Sociedad have picked up points in each of their last seven away LaLiga matches against Rayo Vallecano, their longest unbeaten run away from home against the Madrid side in the top-flight, and their longest ongoing unbeaten away streak against any opponent in the competition.

beIN SPORTS 3.original_title: Real Oviedo vs Elche - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 32

beIN SPORTS 3.desc: Real Oviedo have won four of their last six LaLiga matches against Elche, one more victory than they managed in their previous 13 top-flight meetings. beIN SPORTS 5.original_title: Al Gharafa vs Al Shahania - Qatar Stars League 2025/26 - W22
beIN SPORTS 5.title: Al Gharafa vs Al Shahania - Qatar Stars League 2025/26 - W22
beIN SPORTS 5.desc: The Qatari League is the official football league in Qatar. The league includes 12 teams. The most famous participating clubs are Al-Sadd, the champions of the last season; Al-Rayyan and Al-Arabi, the popular teams, Al-Duhail and Al-Gharafa, serious contenders for the title every season. The Qatari league includes star names such as Firmino, Verratti, and Qatari Akram Afif, the best player in Asia.

beIN SPORTS 5.desc: The Turkish Süper Lig is the top-flight competition of the Turkish football league system and is live and exclusive on beIN SPORTS. beIN SPORTS 5.title: T100 Triathlon World Tour 2026 - Singapore
beIN SPORTS 5.desc:
The T100 Singapore 2026 is part of the T100 Triathlon World Tour, featuring elite athletes competing over the 100km distance (2km swim, 80km bike, 18km run) in the heart of Marina Bay. 
Held across a spectacular city course with closed roads and iconic landmarks, the event combines world-class competition with a vibrant multi-sport festival atmosphere
